creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
What's in /var/log/messages around the time of the freeze?

If you refrain from using rc.conf or loader.conf to load the module, then does a freeze occur in response to this? 

kldload i915kms

----

(In reply to Oleksandr Kryvulia from comment #0)

> drm-devel-kmod-5.5.19.g20211013 from ports

Built and installed from ports source whilst running OS dfd704b7fb2, yes?

----

Reference: 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?qt=range&q=dfd704b7fb2> (2021-10-23)
